name: Arbiter Guardrails
description: Enforce Arbiter policy decisions for OpenClaw tool calls before execution.

arbiterUrl.label: Arbiter Base URL
arbiterUrl.help: Base URL for the Arbiter interceptor, for example http://localhost:8080.

tenantId.label: Tenant ID
tenantId.help: Tenant identifier included in canonical requests and state records.

gatewayKey.label: Gateway Shared Key
gatewayKey.help: Optional key for /v1/intercept routes when Arbiter gateway auth is enabled.

actorIdMode.label: Actor ID Source
actorIdMode.help: Use OpenClaw agent ID by default or force a fixed actor ID from plugin config.

actorId.label: Fixed Actor ID
actorId.help: Used only when actorIdMode is config.

protectTools.label: Protected Tool Names
protectTools.help: Only tools in this list are intercepted by Arbiter.

recordState.label: Record Action State
recordState.help: When enabled, sends /v1/state/actions after guarded tool calls.

failClosed.label: Fail Closed
failClosed.help: Block protected tool calls when Arbiter is unavailable or responses are invalid.

timeoutMs.label: HTTP Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Per-request timeout for Arbiter intercept, verify, and state calls.
